insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new ones should not use this hook.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook in new checkout UI extensions and update existing ones to avoid using it. They should look for alternative solutions to achieve the same functionality. The deprecation does not immediately break existing extensions, but it's essential to migrate to ensure future compatibility. Developers can use the Checkout UI extensions API to find alternative solutions.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will not be immediately affected by this deprecation, but they may notice changes in the behavior of checkout UI extensions that have not been updated to use alternative solutions.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation matters because it affects the functionality of checkout UI extensions, which are crucial for merchants to customize their checkout experiences. Developers must adapt to ensure their extensions continue to work as expected.
insight.code_example: query { checkout { id } } mutation { checkoutComplete { userErrors { message } } }

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires FixedAmount line item discounts to represent per-unit discounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows server-side code to handle breaking changes to Action extensions, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, ensuring that existing workflows use the latest URL after app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, including updates to App Update, GCS bundle upload validation, and long URL wrapping fixes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree have been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets to be configured with country-subdivision regions.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, as of API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07, and will be removed in a future version.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS extensions, app pricing, and flow with breaking changes ahead

themes.title: POS Extensions
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and starting with POS UI extensions API version 2026-07, fixed-amount line item discounts must represent a per-unit discount. This allows for more flexibility in POS event observation and data synchronization.

themes.title: App Pricing and Policy Updates
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated to include more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, the App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been clarified to emphasize honest and transparent review practices.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and Breaking Changes
themes.detail: Shopify Flow has been updated to reduce breaking changes, with action runtime URLs now updating automatically. However, the Customer Account API will remove the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree in version 2026-10.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and comply with updated App Store requirements policy 1.3
Prepare for removal of Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree in Customer Account API
